item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 131830Z AUTO 27007KT 240V300 9999 SCT045 SCT058 BKN090 11/09 Q1008 TEMPO 26015G25KT 4000 -SHRA SCT020CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 131700Z 1318/1418 26015KT 9999 SCT020 PROB40 TEMPO 1318/1322 26015G25KT 4000 -SHRA SCT020TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1318/1322 26015G25KT 4000 -SHRA SCT020CB PROB40 TEMPO 1410/1416 4000 SHRA BKN020CB PROB30 TEMPO 1413/1417 2000 TSRA BKN020CB
